name: Hungary
headline: Hungary CARRY-FORWARD HOLD — no new score change proposed. May 13 band-crossing proposal (37.5 → 41.4, Developing → Functional, boundary-case at 0.4 above functional floor) remains PENDING in the queue and is the active proposal of record. Today's event (May 13 EU Commission team dispatched to Budapest to assess 10.4B EUR fund release pathway) is a procedural milestone confirming the institutional reform pathway is being processed — sub-threshold evidence that strengthens the existing pending proposal but does NOT trigger a new score change per the carry-forward protocol. Per scanner cycle context: 'Re-assess June 12 per schedule unless legislative milestone triggers earlier.' Today's EU team-dispatch is not a legislative milestone. The May 25 Magyar-Brussels visit and May 31 Sulyok dismissal compliance deadline are the next material scoring triggers.
carry_forward_note: This proposal is a CARRY-FORWARD ENTRY documenting that the May 13 band-crossing proposal remains pending and active. No new dimensional changes proposed today. The May 13 evidence (EU team dispatch May 13) is sub-threshold supportive — it strengthens the existing proposal but does not trigger re-scoring. Per assessor instructions: 'DO NOT re-flag May 13 pending items (Hungary band crossing already in queue — note carry-forward but don't propose new band change).'

SYS.rationale: Carry-forward from May 13. 3 new standalone ministries operational; structural-realignment sustained.

INT.rationale: Carry-forward from May 13. ICC reversal posture + Magyar consistency under Fidesz opposition sustained.

evidence.summary: Euronews May 13 2026: EU Commission dispatched senior official team to Budapest to assess 10.4B EUR fund release pathway. Procedural milestone confirming reform pathway being institutionally processed.
US News May 11: Hungary's race to access EU's 10.4B EUR is 'ambitious but possible' (officials). 6.5B EUR grants + 3.9B EUR cheap loans dependent on reform delivery.
IPS News May 2026: What Hungary's new pro-democracy government means for rule of law.

10.4B EUR fund release pathway (6.5B grants + 3.9B loans) dependent on reform delivery.

Brussels visit pencilled ~May 25 (next material scoring trigger).
May 13 band-crossing proposal (37.5 → 41.4, developing → functional) remains pending and is the active proposal of record.
rationale: CARRY-FORWARD ONLY. No new dimensional changes proposed today. The May 13 band-crossing proposal remains in the pending queue. Today's EU team-dispatch event is sub-threshold supportive (strengthens existing proposal) but does not trigger re-scoring. Next material scoring triggers: May 25 Magyar-Brussels visit, May 31 Sulyok dismissal compliance deadline, June 9 30-day reassessment, June 12 scheduled reassessment per carry-forward protocol.
